problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
hypothesis: If Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region is applied to chemistry, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
